CopyrightFooter.Lolcat: © {{year}} Wyvern Sociaw. Aww wights wesewved uwu~

Body.Default: We're thrilled to have you join the Wyvern family. Let's get you set up!
Body.Lolcat: We iz sooo happi u join da Wyvern famiwy!! ^w^ wetz gets u setted up!!

ActionPrompt.Default: To start exploring, please verify your account:
ActionPrompt.Lolcat: Tu stawt expwowing, pwease confurm ur acc: >w<

LinkExpiry.Default: This verification link is valid for 30 minutes.
LinkExpiry.Lolcat: Dis confurmashun wink works onwy 30 minnyutz, nya~

Support.Default: Need help? Contact us at support@wyvern.gg or check the official Wyvern community.
Support.Lolcat: Nid halp?? >.< Pwease ping us at support@wyvern.gg or chekk da offishul Wyvern comyoonity :3

SignOff.Lolcat:
Cheewz n snugglez!
— da Wyvern hoomanz uwu

Taken.Lolcat: Sowwy, dat usahname ish alweady nommed up >:3

TooShort.Default: Username must be at least 2 characters long.
TooShort.Lolcat: Usahname must be biggah than 2 lettyz uwu

TooLong.Default: Username may not be longer than 15 characters.
TooLong.Lolcat: Usahname cant haz moar than 15 lettyz owo

InvalidCharacters.Default: Username can only contain letters, numbers, dots, or underscores.
InvalidCharacters.Lolcat: Usahname can haz only lettyz, numbahz, dotz, or unda-scoops :3

RepeatedSymbols.Default: Username cannot contain consecutive dots or underscores.
RepeatedSymbols.Lolcat: Usahname cant haz spammy dotz or unda-scoops >w<

ContainsWyvern.Lolcat: Usahname cant haz 'wyvern' in it, sowwy nya~

BlockedPhrase.Lolcat: Usahname haz nawty wurdz, bad kitty! >:c

TooShort.Default: Password must be at least 8 characters.
TooShort.Lolcat: Pawsswurd haz tu be 8+ lettyz nyaw~

TooLong.Default: Password must be at most 64 characters.
TooLong.Lolcat: Pawsswurd cant haz moar dan 64 lettyz :3

MissingUpper.Default: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter.
MissingUpper.Lolcat: Pawsswurd needs one big scawie letty >:3

MissingLower.Default: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter.
MissingLower.Lolcat: Pawsswurd needs one smol letty uwu

MissingDigit.Default: Password must contain at least one number.
MissingDigit.Lolcat: Pawsswurd must haz 1 numbah, gib numbah pwease ^-^

MissingSpecial.Default: Password must contain at least one special character.

Taken.Default: This email is already in use. Please try another.
Taken.Lolcat: Dis emaiw iz awready nommed up. twy anothah uwu

TooLong.Default: Email must be at most 320 characters.

InvalidFormat.Lolcat: Emaiw formattin iz all wonky owo

InvalidSymbol.Default: Email must contain a single '@' symbol.

UnresolvableDomain.Default: The email domain '{domain}' appears invalid. Try a different email or contact support if this is correct.
UnresolvableDomain.Lolcat: Da emaiw domain '{domain}' iz sus. twy diffewent emaiw or ask supowt nya~

InvalidBirthday.Default: Birthday cannot be in the future.

TooYoung.Default: You must be at least 13 years old to use this service.
TooYoung.Lolcat: U must be 13+ to pway hewe >w<

Suspicious.Default: Are you really {age} years old? If so, please contact support — we’ll buy you a cake!

VerifyEmailRequired.Default: Almost there! Check your inbox and verify your email to finish signing up.
